> build · big-pickle

→ Read .
→ Read lazy-dev-loop
→ Read lazy-dev-loop/README.md
→ Read lazy-dev-loop/bridge
What would you like to know about the session implementation? There are three session-related files in the bridge:

- `opencode_session.py` — persistent OpenCode sessions via `serve + attach`
- `session_manager.py` — legacy async session manager
- `session_store.py` — session data persistence

Happy to read any of them or explain how sessions work end-to-end.

> build · big-pickle

→ Read .
→ Read lazy-dev-loop
The project has a single directory `lazy-dev-loop/` with `bridge/`, `docs/`, `extension/` subdirectories and a `README.md`. What would you like me to test?
